Effective Date of RepealRepeal applicable to the 2005 and subsequent crops of tobacco, see , set out as an Effective Date note under .section 643 of Pub. L. 108–357section 518 of this title

Savings ProvisionRepeal not to affect the liability of any person under this subpart with respect to the 2004 or an earlier crop of tobacco, see , set out as a note under .section 614 of Pub. L. 108–357section 515 of this title

Tobacco Definition and Increase of Marketing Quotas and Acreage Allotments To Meet Demand Unaffected by Acreage-Poundage Marketing Quotas and Price Support Provisions, , , which provided that nothing in the Act could be construed as affecting the authority or responsibility of the Secretary of Agriculture under former sections 1301(b)(15) or 1313(i) of this title with respect to providing that different types of tobacco were to be treated as different kinds of tobacco, or with respect to increasing allotments or quotas for farms producing certain types of tobacco, was repealed by , §§ 611(n), 643, , , 1536, applicable to the 2005 and subsequent crops of tobacco.Pub.
